title: ageratina dillonii
intro: Ageratina dillonii, also known as Texas ageratina or mountain silver top, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, due to the presence of essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Ageratina dillonii include relief from digestive issues, reduction of fever, and alleviation of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Ageratina dillonii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
